'''鈭歡-j-n''' ('''kagajan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbin|unbin]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-j-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbin|unbin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-j-n
|-
! Lemma
| kagajan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigajan|thigajan]] || [[word:jigajan|jigajan]] || [[word:shigajan|shigajan]] || [[word:kigajan|kigajan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugajan|thuthugajan]] || [[word:jujugajan|jujugajan]] || [[word:shushugajan|shushugajan]] || [[word:kukugajan|kukugajan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugajan|thugajan]] || [[word:jugajan|jugajan]] || [[word:shugajan|shugajan]] || [[word:kugajan|kugajan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugajan|thugajan]] || [[word:jugajan|jugajan]] || [[word:shugajan|shugajan]] || [[word:kugajan|kugajan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegajan|thegajan]] || [[word:jegajan|jegajan]] || [[word:shegajan|shegajan]] || [[word:kegajan|kegajan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogajan|thothogajan]] || [[word:jojogajan|jojogajan]] || [[word:shoshogajan|shoshogajan]] || [[word:kokogajan|kokogajan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogajan|thogajan]] || [[word:jogajan|jogajan]] || [[word:shogajan|shogajan]] || [[word:kogajan|kogajan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogajan|thogajan]] || [[word:jogajan|jogajan]] || [[word:shogajan|shogajan]] || [[word:kogajan|kogajan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gajan|th忙gajan]] || [[word:j忙gajan|j忙gajan]] || [[word:sh忙gajan|sh忙gajan]] || [[word:k忙gajan|k忙gajan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagajan|thathagajan]] || [[word:jajagajan|jajagajan]] || [[word:shashagajan|shashagajan]] || [[word:kakagajan|kakagajan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagajan|thagajan]] || [[word:jagajan|jagajan]] || [[word:shagajan|shagajan]] || [[word:kagajan|kagajan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagajan|thagajan]] || [[word:jagajan|jagajan]] || [[word:shagajan|shagajan]] || [[word:kagajan|kagajan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagajan|shagajan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagajan|goshagajan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagajan|gokishagajan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagajan眉|shagajan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagajankn眉|goshagajankn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagajan眉|gokishagajan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagajansh毛|shagajansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagajanksh毛|goshagajanksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagajansh毛|gokishagajansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagajanro|shagajanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagajankro|goshagajankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagajanro|gokishagajanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagajanmu|shagajanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagajankmu|goshagajankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagajanmu|gokishagajanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagajansher|shagajansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagajanksher|goshagajanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagajansher|gokishagajansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagajang|shagajang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagajankng|goshagajankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagajang|gokishagajang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagajanya|shagajanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagajankya|goshagajankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagajanya|gokishagajanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagajanyam|shagajanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagajankyam|goshagajankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagajanyam|gokishagajanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagajan眉sh毛|shagajan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagajankn眉sh毛|goshagajankn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagajan眉sh毛|gokishagajan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagajan眉ro|shagajan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagajankn眉ro|goshagajankn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagajan眉ro|gokishagajan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagajan眉mu|shagajan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagajankn眉mu|goshagajankn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagajan眉mu|gokishagajan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagajansh毛n眉|shagajansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagajanksh毛n眉|goshagajanksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagajansh毛n眉|gokishagajansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagajansh毛ro|shagajansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagajanksh毛ro|goshagajanksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagajansh毛ro|gokishagajansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagajansh毛mu|shagajansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagajanksh毛mu|goshagajanksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagajansh毛mu|gokishagajansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagajanron眉|shagajanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagajankron眉|goshagajankron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagajanron眉|gokishagajanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagajanrosh毛|shagajanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagajankrosh毛|goshagajankrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagajanrosh毛|gokishagajanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagajanromu|shagajanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagajankromu|goshagajankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagajanromu|gokishagajanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagajanmun眉|shagajanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagajankmun眉|goshagajankmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagajanmun眉|gokishagajanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagajanmush毛|shagajanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagajankmush毛|goshagajankmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagajanmush毛|gokishagajanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagajanmuro|shagajanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagajankmuro|goshagajankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagajanmuro|gokishagajanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
